title: The Keys to Robin’s Rescue: Key Exchange
description: In the Enies Lobby Climax storyline, this section centers on CP9, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Enies Lobby Climax conflict through CP9, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #10, focusing on the immediate stakes of the keys to robin’s rescue: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: CP9
dialogue.text: YOUR MANLY FAME WOULD CRY AS WELL!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then I'll at least do this...!! Hope-fully,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then I lost conscious-ness... and then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Never step into that territory again...

dialogue.speaker: CP9
dialogue.text: It was as though you were...

dialogue.speaker: CP9
dialogue.text: At least I've got the key.
